CustomField.description: Fully qualified API name of the field to evaluate on the Trip or its related objects. The engine reads this field value at runtime. Supported paths: Opportunity.Transport_Urgency__c, Destination_Location__r.Site_Access__c, or direct Trip fields. Ignored when Is_Always_Active__c = true.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: API field path to evaluate (e.g., Opportunity.Transport_Urgency__c or Destination_Location__r.Site_Access__c). Leave blank if Always Active.
CustomField.label: Trigger Field
